channel.title: Planet Edited on
channel.description: Recent content in Planet Edited on

item.title: Planet Edited? More details to come!
item.description: Today I had the possibility to announce a new tool for the Fedora Project, a sub-planet called ‘Edited’ mainly focused on Fedora-related posts and announcements. The scenario we gonna have when Edited will become a known tool by the whole project can be resumed as it follows: team leaders or whoever will be appointed to, will send out their team’s status and any relevant announcement such as important changes, needs for help directed to any contributor unsure about where and how to start contributing to a specific team.
